career_angle: LLM developments affect every developer. Understand the capabilities and limitations - knowing what AI can't do is as valuable as knowing what it can.

factors.name: Source Authority
factors.rationale: 'GPT 5.4: SOTA Knowledge Work -and- Coding -and- CUA Model...' -- AI News (smol.ai) is unclassified or low-reliability source (tier_5, reliability: 20%) reporting on OpenAI, GPT-5

factors.name: Evidence Quality
factors.rationale: mentions benchmarks or datasets; specific figures cited: 'SWorld-Verified 75.0%', 'line and **GDPval 83%'

factors.name: Reproducibility
factors.rationale: 'GPT 5.4: SOTA Knowledge Work -and- Coding -and- CUA Model...' (OpenAI, GPT-5) -- no code, methodology, or reproducibility details provided

factors.name: Conflict of Interest
factors.rationale: AI News (smol.ai) covers OpenAI, GPT-5 -- no overt promotional language, but independence not confirmed

factors.name: Consensus
factors.rationale: hedging language ('up to ') suggests the source itself isn't confident

factors.name: Specificity
factors.rationale: vague hedging: 'up to '; cites concrete figures: 'SWorld-Verified 75.0%', 'line and **GDPval 83%'

factors.name: Track Record
factors.rationale: AI News (smol.ai) on OpenAI/GPT-5 topics -- insufficient history to assess
